cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby nakreslila [hlp]čtverec o straně 60 pixelů[/hlp] s [hlp]tloušťkou pera 5[/hlp]. Nezapomeňte nastavit tloušťku pera [hlp]před kreslením[/hlp].
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="50" y="50"><field name="WIDTH">5</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="50" y="50"><field name="WIDTH">5</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
